notes: Manifest v2 is the active routing source; the legacy v1 routing manifest and Pi mirror were retired during cutover.
Domain agent docs and workflow files declared here may be planned paths until later migration prompts create content.

skills.name: Streamer.bot Dev
skills.description: Streamer.bot C# runtime actions and Streamer.bot-side integrations under Actions/.

skills.name: LotAT Tech
skills.description: LotAT technical pipeline, C# engine, JSON schema, and story runtime implementation.

skills.name: LotAT Writer
skills.description: LotAT narrative design, adventure content, lore, worldbuilding, and reusable story elements.

skills.name: Art Director
skills.description: Diffusion prompts, character art, stream visuals, and art-pipeline guidance.

skills.name: Brand Steward
skills.description: Brand consistency for public-facing copy, titles, marketing, canon, voice, and community messaging.

skills.name: Content Repurposer
skills.description: Short-form clips, captions, platform formatting, content calendars, and content-pipeline tooling.

skills.name: App Dev
skills.description: Standalone stream interaction apps, dashboards, overlays, brokers, and TypeScript app tooling.

skills.name: Product Dev
skills.description: Product documentation, technical knowledge articles, specs, and future customer-facing product content.

skills.name: Ops
skills.description: Validation, sync workflow, change summaries, local tooling, and operational repo maintenance.

skills.name: Canon Guardian
skills.description: Shared canon review procedure for brand-level and LotAT-level continuity.

skills.name: Change Summary
skills.description: Terminal handoff format for changed files, paste targets, setup steps, and validation output.

skills.name: Sync

skills.name: Validation
skills.description: Validator command selection, schema checks, and drift-check procedure.

skills.name: Coordination
